steps.title: Read the vertex form
steps.content:
The equation is written in vertex form:
$$y=a(x-h)^2+k$$
For the given model,
$$y=-16(x-7.4)^2+780$$
the vertex is $(7.4{,}780)$.

steps.title: Interpret the maximum
steps.content: Because the coefficient $-16$ is negative, the parabola opens downward, so the vertex gives the maximum height. The firework reaches $780$ feet at $7.4$ seconds.

steps.title: Match the statement
steps.content: Choice B gives a maximum height of $780$ feet at $7.4$ seconds after launch. The answer is B.
